description_long: This is a large, cubic wooden storage box with a weathered, plank-textured exterior and reinforced edges. One side features a prominent yellow warning sign with a black exclamation mark, suggesting caution or hazardous contents. Another side displays two circular, metallic-looking fasteners or vent covers, possibly for securing or ventilating the box. A third side is plain, showing only the wood grain and frame, while the fourth side is marked with bold black text reading 'This Side Up' and a large upward arrow, indicating correct orientation for handling. The box appears robust and suitable for heavy-duty storage or transport in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites. Its size and markings imply it is designed for visibility and safe handling in busy or hazardous areas.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with warning signage, fasteners, and clear handling instructions. Its robust build and markings suggest use in industrial or urban settings.
description_view_0: This side features a yellow warning sign with a black exclamation mark on the wooden surface.
description_view_1: This side has two circular, metallic-looking fasteners or vent covers on the wood panel.
description_view_2: This side is plain, showing only the wood grain and frame with no additional markings.
description_view_3: This side displays the text 'This Side Up' and a large black arrow pointing upward.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: warning sign, handling instructions, no dedicated label area
